title: Design: Replace release-please with a cog tag-only release flow
summary: Technical specification for a tag-only release flow using cocogitto, superseded by ADR fhsk-dgo.
notes: Superseded by ADR fhsk-dgo (Accepted 2026-06-09). Document status: Superseded (was Draft for review). Design bead: fhsk-9g0. Retained for historical context; current release flow uses release-please with in-file plugin versions. Contained detailed technical specs for cog-based release system, but direction was reversed by fhsk-dgo.
